articles.author: Lauren Forristal
articles.title: Every new iOS 27 feature that’s worth knowing about - TechCrunch
articles.description: While it's not flashy like Apple’s new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence upgrades, there are still a number of additions to iOS 27 worth looking at.
articles.content: While Apples new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence announcements dominated the WWDC spotlight earlier this month, the tech giant also packed iOS 27 with a number of upgrades across its everyday apps and… [+5118 chars]
